items.claim: CLD is fighting more clinically and looking to finish fights compared to his previous performances.
items.quote: He's fighting a lot more clinical. Um in that fight he was really more touchandgo. Um now now he's looking to finish

items.claim: Jared Cannonier has become less active and less motivated over time.
items.quote: less and less active as the years go on. You know, less and less motivated.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier will slow down after the first round.
items.quote: I think he's going to look good in that first round like he usually does, but he's going to slow down.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier lacks the speed and delivery package to land punches on CLD at this stage of his career.
items.quote: I don't think Jared Caner has really the speed and just the delivery system as everyone's saying now, right? I don't think he has that delivery package to to get that punch to CLLD's chin

items.claim: Danyelle Barbosa is stronger than Anna Melisano in striking, grappling, and wrestling.
items.quote: I think Danny Barbosa is just a little bit just a little bit stronger everywhere.

items.claim: Anna Melisano is moving up in weight from strawweight to flyweight for this fight.
items.quote: She's just spent a lot of her career at straw weight at 115. This fight's going to be up at flyweight at 125.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan has a significant height advantage over Alberto Montes.
items.quote: the height difference in this one is something I think he's going to have a really hard time with.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan starts fights with high intensity.
items.quote: McMillan, you know, he comes out like he shot out of a cannon

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has a tendency to panic wrestle when pressured.
items.quote: I think Mitch Ramirez panic wrestles and he's going to panic wrestle himself right into a front choke.

items.claim: Austin Bashi has elite core strength and defensive grappling ability.
items.quote: This guy probably has the strongest bridge game in the world. I mean, you're not going to hold this guy down
